hybrid.description: Balanced incumbent-focused profile for the default arc-flow MIP. This is the best first profile to try when you want faster practical answers without going fully short-horizon.

two-minute.description: Short-budget incumbent-hunting profile for the default arc-flow MIP. It targets about a two-minute run unless you override the time limit on the command line.

max-accuracy.description: Long-run proof-quality profile for the default arc-flow MIP. Use this when you care more about bound movement and eventual optimality than about a quick incumbent.
